playwright.notes: Browser testing and E2E automation. Requires: npx playwright install chromium

chrome-devtools.notes: Browser debugging: network inspection, console errors, performance profiling

notes: This file configures MCP servers for Claude Code (project scope).
Both servers require local Claude Code — they do NOT work in claude.ai/code web sandbox.
Run scripts/setup-mcp.sh once per machine to install browser binaries and register MCPs.
Playwright MCP: use for frontend-feature and e2e tasks (browser testing).
Chrome DevTools MCP: use for debugging network, console errors, and performance.
